title: neltuma pallida
intro: Neltuma pallida, a flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, is a member of the family Bignonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Neltuma pallida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
